prompt: Create a stylish overhead three-quarter food photography scene on a matte beige stone tabletop, showing exactly 2 plated soft-boiled eggs with homemade mayonnaise-style yellow sauce and parsley garnish: one serving on a large glossy black textured round plate in the foreground right, and one serving on a plain off-white round plate in the background left. Each egg is upright, coated with rich golden yellow sauce pooling at the base, sprinkled with fine green parsley and black seasoning flecks. Add playful thin white hand-drawn doodle overlays as if sketched on top of the photo: exactly 2 chef-character outlines around the eggs, with the foreground egg drawn as a cute chef holding a whisk and wearing a chef hat, and the background egg drawn with a chef hat and raised spatula; include exactly 1 whisk, exactly 1 spatula, exactly 2 chef hats, exactly 12 small flower doodles, exactly 8 sparkle/star doodles, and several dotted whimsical flight trails curling across the tabletop. Use natural indoor restaurant lighting, realistic smartphone food-photo texture, shallow shadows, warm neutral color grading, a designer-kitchen social media aesthetic, and no visible text. Customize the dish as soft-boiled egg with homemade oeuf mayo sauce, garnish as parsley, foreground plate color as glossy black, background plate color as off-white, and doodle color as white.
